channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump Media, Reddit surge despite questionable profit prospects, taking on the 'meme stock' mantle
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Reddit and Trump Media are the first notable social media companies to begin trading publicly in the last five years. They're also, thanks to the rabid reception among investors coupled with the companies' fuzzy profit outlooks, the latest meme stocks.
item.dc:creator: AP, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok is under investigation by the FTC over data practices and could face a lawsuit
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Federal Trade Commission is investigating TikTok over its data and security practices, a probe that could lead to a settlement or a lawsuit against the company, according to a person familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kansas moves to join Texas and other states in requiring porn sites to verify people's ages
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — Kansas is poised to require pornography websites to verify visitors are adults, a move that would follow Texas and a handful of other states despite concerns about privacy and how broadly the law could be applied.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and SEAN MURPHY, Associated Press, ABC 4
